testcase.name: app.tests
testcase.error: ..\..\..\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Lib\importlib\__init__.py:88: in import_module return _bootstrap._gcd_import(name[level:], package, level) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1398: in _gcd_import ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1371: in _find_and_load ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1342: in _find_and_load_unlocked ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:938: in _load_unlocked ??? .venv\Lib\site-packages\_pytest\assertion\rewrite.py:197: in exec_module exec(co, module.__dict__) app\tests\conftest.py:17: in <module> from app.api.deps import get_async_db, get_db app\api\deps.py:14: in <module> from app.core.redis_client import redis_client app\core\redis_client.py:2: in <module> import fakeredis E ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'fakeredis'
